characters.description: Characters present, in left-to-right order if multiple.

outfit.description: Outfit token. jerry: jeans_buttondown|sweater_jeans. george: polo_chinos|windbreaker. elaine: blazer_pants|floral_dress. kramer: vintage_shirt_pants. Pick the closest match.

action.description: Short free-text describing what the character(s) are doing. 5-15 words. No proper nouns outside the character names.

caption.description: The full caption string assembled from the locked template: 'A {shot_type} shot in {scene}. {characters_clause}. {action}. Seinfeld sitcom style, 90s NBC sitcom lighting, multi-cam look.' Where characters_clause = '{name} in {outfit}' joined by ' and '.
